name: Motohiko Hino
abstract: Motohiko "Toko" Hino (January 3, 1946 in Tokyo – May 13, 1999) was a Japanese jazz drummer. Hino's father, who was a dancer and musician, taught Hino and his brother, Terumasa Hino, tap dancing as children.

concerts.label: Newport Jazz Festival: Duke Ellington and His Orchestra and the Terumasa Hino Sextet

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Liebman
about_quotes.evidence: We’re all in the studio together... Hino would come over and do something with American musicians... Toko’s date that we did up at Swallow’s
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Liebman — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
